summary_text: ### 修正対象 - `scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-requirements.md` - `scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-design.md` - `scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-tasks.md` - `scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-implement.md` ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-requirements.md b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-requirements.md new file mode 100644 index 0000000..e9eb73d --- /dev/null +++ b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-requirements.md @@ -0,0 +1,23 @@ +# {{TITLE}} + +## Objective +{{OBJECTIVE}} + +## Scope +### IN +{{SCOPE_IN}} + +### OUT +{{SCOPE_OUT}} + +## Constraints +{{CONSTRAINTS}} + +## Edge Cases +{{EDGE_CASES}} + +## Acceptance Criteria +{{ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA}} + +## Done Definition +{{DONE_DEFINITION}} diff --git a/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-design.md b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-design.md new file mode 100644 index 0000000..7c5524e --- /dev/null +++ b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-design.md @@ -0,0 +1,26 @@ +# {{TITLE}} + +## Design Options +### Option 1: {{OPTION_1_NAME}} +{{OPTION_1_DESCRIPTION}} + +### Option 2: {{OPTION_2_NAME}} +{{OPTION_2_DESCRIPTION}} + +## Trade-offs Table +| Option | Strengths | Weaknesses | Cost | Risk | +| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | +| {{OPTION_1_NAME}} | {{OPTION_1_STRENGTHS}} | {{OPTION_1_WEAKNESSES}} | {{OPTION_1_COST}} | {{OPTION_1_RISK}} | +| {{OPTION_2_NAME}} | {{OPTION_2_STRENGTHS}} | {{OPTION_2_WEAKNESSES}} | {{OPTION_2_COST}} | {{OPTION_2_RISK}} | + +## Recommended Option +{{RECOMMENDED_OPTION}} + +## Risk Register +| Risk | Impact | Likelihood | Mitigation | +| --- | --- | --- | --- | +| {{RISK_1}} | {{RISK_1_IMPACT}} | {{RISK_1_LIKELIHOOD}} | {{RISK_1_MITIGATION}} | +| {{RISK_2}} | {{RISK_2_IMPACT}} | {{RISK_2_LIKELIHOOD}} | {{RISK_2_MITIGATION}} | + +## Dependencies +{{DEPENDENCIES}} diff --git a/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-tasks.md b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-tasks.md new file mode 100644 index 0000000..df455f8 --- /dev/null +++ b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-tasks.md @@ -0,0 +1,25 @@ +# {{TITLE}} + +## Task List +1. {{TASK_1}} +2. {{TASK_2}} +3. {{TASK_3}} +4. {{TASK_4}} +5. {{TASK_5}} + +## Dependencies +| Task | Depends On | Notes | +| --- | --- | --- | +| {{TASK_1_REF}} | {{TASK_1_DEPENDS_ON}} | {{TASK_1_NOTES}} | +| {{TASK_2_REF}} | {{TASK_2_DEPENDS_ON}} | {{TASK_2_NOTES}} | +| {{TASK_3_REF}} | {{TASK_3_DEPENDS_ON}} | {{TASK_3_NOTES}} | + +## Estimated Tiers +| Task | Tier | Rationale | +| --- | --- | --- | +| {{TASK_1_REF}} | {{TASK_1_TIER}} | {{TASK_1_TIER_RATIONALE}} | +| {{TASK_2_REF}} | {{TASK_2_TIER}} | {{TASK_2_TIER_RATIONALE}} | +| {{TASK_3_REF}} | {{TASK_3_TIER}} | {{TASK_3_TIER_RATIONALE}} | + +## Parallel Opportunities +{{PARALLEL_OPPORTUNITIES}} diff --git a/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-implement.md b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-implement.md new file mode 100644 index 0000000..9ada883 --- /dev/null +++ b/scripts/sdd-prompts/sdd-implement.md @@ -0,0 +1,21 @@ +# {{TITLE}} + +## Implementation Protocol + +1. RED +Write a failing test that proves {{TARGET_BEHAVIOR}}. +Capture current behavior, expected outcome, and failure evidence in {{RED_EVIDENCE_PATH}}. + +2. GREEN +Implement the minimal code change required to satisfy the failing test. +Limit edits to {{ALLOWED_EDIT_SCOPE}} and record the passing result in {{GREEN_EVIDENCE_PATH}}. + +3. REFACTOR +Clean up naming, duplication, or structure without changing behavior. +Confirm tests still pass and summarize final code shape in {{REFACTOR_NOTES}}. + +## Guardrails +{{IMPLEMENTATION_GUARDRAILS}} + +## Exit Checks +{{EXIT_CHECKS}} ``` ### 検証結果 - `scripts/sdd-prompts/` を新規作成し、指定の4ファイルのみ追加しました。 - 各テンプレートは `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` 形式で統一しました。 - 行数確認: - `sdd-requirements.md`: 23行 - `sdd-design.md`: 26行 - `sdd-tasks.md`: 25行 - `sdd-implement.md`: 21行 - 仮定: - `fugue-execute.mjs` が置換可能な汎用 `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` を受け取る前提で、変数名は用途が明確な英大文字スネーク/識別子寄りで作成しました。 - テスト追加や既存コード変更は実施していません。
